learning_goal_or_scope: represent problems through abstraction algorithms and simulation
concepts: decomposition representation algorithms agents models verification validation
practical_skills: define and implement a model run reproducible experiments explain limitations
evidence_or_output: model description code tests sensitivity analysis

learning_goal_or_scope: write and reason about programs and their behaviour
concepts: values types control flow collections functions errors testing data structures
practical_skills: create test debug and explain small programs
evidence_or_output: working implementation tests and documented assumptions

learning_goal_or_scope: turn requirements into a maintainable running system
concepts: requirements architecture domain models UML contracts quality security deployment
practical_skills: build test document and operate a system
evidence_or_output: traceability design rationale tests threat model and deployment notes

learning_goal_or_scope: design and evaluate systems around human tasks
concepts: user research prototyping interaction flows usability accessibility evaluation
practical_skills: conduct research create prototypes evaluate with evidence
evidence_or_output: prototype history evaluation protocol findings and limitations

learning_goal_or_scope: represent shared state and update it safely
concepts: relational model SQL constraints normalisation transactions concurrency indexes security
practical_skills: create schema queries migrations and tests
evidence_or_output: schema rationale queries transaction tests and security analysis

concepts: data information processes value governance adoption resistance implementation
practical_skills: analyse organisational context and justify an intervention
evidence_or_output: process map stakeholder analysis value claim and implementation risks
connections: technical design meets institutions and routines

concepts: iterations Scrum Kanban XP continuous integration technical debt teamwork process limits
practical_skills: plan deliver review test and improve increments
evidence_or_output: decision log review record retrospective and integration evidence

learning_goal_or_scope: make claims that are proportionate to evidence
concepts: research questions literature concepts qualitative quantitative mixed methods validity ethics reproducibility
practical_skills: design and report a defensible investigation
evidence_or_output: protocol data or artefact analysis limitations and contribution

learning_goal_or_scope: connect probabilistic models to human tasks and institutions
concepts: training validation uncertainty trust fairness explainability human control
practical_skills: design evaluate and document AI-assisted interaction
evidence_or_output: baseline comparison error analysis uncertainty and escalation path

learning_goal_or_scope: investigate whether a digital product or service creates value
concepts: problem discovery users buyers business models experiments metrics ethics
practical_skills: run a bounded product experiment and interpret behaviour
evidence_or_output: experiment log threshold cost model result and pivot decision
connections: distribution and organisational context constrain products

learning_goal_or_scope: connect problem discovery to implementation and evaluation
concepts: requirements domain model interaction architecture persistence testing deployment evaluation
practical_skills: trace a complete intervention and its limits
evidence_or_output: requirements matrix tests operational plan and evaluation argument
connections: artefact and evaluation are distinct contributions

learning_goal_or_scope: combine the book's ideas in new domains
concepts: problem delimitation model design evidence reflection communication
practical_skills: develop a coherent project proposal or prototype
evidence_or_output: question model design evidence plan and reflection
connections: abstraction and practice must remain connected
